name: The Gzone - UK Battle Rap League
description: The UK's uncensored arena for the next generation of MCs. Watch high-stakes rap battles, explore official MC rankings, and get tickets for live events at Peacock Gymnasium. Step into the G-Zone where we dont play. This is the live arena for raw UK battle rap, where rising talent and established names clash in front of a crowd. From headline matchups to undercard wars, every battle carries weight, every round matters, and every MC is fighting to prove they belong.
